name: GPT-SoVITS: Powerful Few-Shot Voice Cloning and TTS Tool
snippet:
Nov 6, 2025 — GPT-SoVITS is an advanced few-shot voice cloning and text-to-speech (TTS) tool that achieves high-quality voice cloning with just 1 minute ...
Traditional voice cloning systems typically require hours of audio data, whereas GPT-SoVITS can clone a voice with just 1 minute of reference audio. This breakthrough feature stems from its innovative two-stage generation architecture.
